sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 89 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection Nos.7,26 & 27 2. For orders on CMA No.108/2022 3. For hearing of main case 12.01.2026 Mr. Qaim Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant This reference application is pending since 2022 without any progress. Even today learned counsel expresses inability to assist and merely seeks time. It appears that the applicant department is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
